nodes.label: Internal Records vs Public Documents
nodes.rationale: A result is written up the tiers, split by when-you-write-it/who-reads-it: internal records (design.md, expK cards, RESULTS.md) written while the work is live for you/future-you/agents; public documents (README.md front door, phaseN-report.md, stageN-report.md) written once the phase closes, for an outside reader. README.md is the hinge - the one place internal work becomes the public front door.
